queries.q: Help me write a testable hypothesis for why onboarding completion is low
We believe shortening signup will boost activation; turn that hunch into a falsifiable statement with success metrics
The team disagrees about whether power users actually want dark mode; frame the assumption so we can test it
Before we invest a quarter building the recommendation engine, what exactly are we betting is true?
Draft a hypothesis statement with primary and guardrail metrics for the new pricing page
We are pivoting to SMB customers; help articulate what success looks like so we can validate the new direction
Form a clear assumption to test about why trial users churn in their first week
Write the We believe that X for Y will Z statement for the referral incentive idea
I need to align the team on what we expect this notification change to do before anyone designs a test
queries.notes: Intent-only phrasing; explicitly upstream of test design

queries.q: Turn this problem statement about cart abandonment into a testable prediction with a numeric target
Design the A/B test for our checkout hypothesis: variants, sample size, and duration
queries.notes: Hypothesis exists; designing the test itself is the partner's job

queries.q: Plan the experiment targeting and traffic split to validate the onboarding change we framed last week
queries.notes: How to test, not what to test

queries.q: We already know what we believe; now calculate how many users per variant and how long to run the test
queries.notes: Sample size and duration are experiment design parameters

queries.q: Analyze the results of the completed pricing experiment and tell me whether it won
Frame the problem statement for declining engagement before we jump to solutions
queries.notes: Problem still unframed; that comes before any hypothesis

queries.q: Organize all our assumptions and ideas about retention into an opportunity solution tree
queries.notes: Many assumptions in a discovery structure, not one testable claim

queries.q: Sketch the full business model for this product idea on a lean canvas
Why does my React component re-render twice in strict mode?
Write a SQL window function to compute 7 day rolling retention
Help me plan a surprise anniversary dinner
